decisions: Reuse the persisted expelled topic state as the archive state to avoid a disruptive SQLite status migration.
Keep the 40-topic active feed unchanged and expose archived topics only through permanent topic URLs, the crawlable archive hub and the sitemap.
Enforce read-only behavior in both the backend and the UI so direct API calls cannot add comments, likes or dislikes.
Keep seed content in data.js and the existing seed functions; expose one explicit idempotent script for applying a chosen subset to an existing database.
Identify every seeded profile as a fictional editorial account rather than presenting invented testimonials as real users.
implemented: Archived topic hydration now exposes isArchived while preserving the compatible expelled database value.
Archived messages reject reactions at the service boundary and render without interactive reaction or quote controls.
SEO pages index substantive archived discussions, provide /archivo and include archive entries in sitemap.xml.
Fresh opt-in demo databases receive 20 descriptive Spanish topics, substantive replies and indexable editorial profile descriptions.
Existing databases can add a bounded subset with npm run seed:editorial -- --limit=N --apply; the command reports which active topics were archived by rotation.
